name: morph-message-conversation
description: A chat preview that morphs into a full conversation: the surface springs between the preview row and the messaging panel while the preview trigger and the Card swap through AnimatePresence — both get real enter and exit. Inside, a header (Avatar, name, online status and a labelled close), a scrolling log of incoming and outgoing message bubbles that pop in, and an Input + round send Button composer stagger in on open and reverse-stagger out on close. Built on framer-motion via block-motion, so the whole morph collapses to a plain crossfade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: The collapsed preview is a single labelled toggle ("Open conversation with … , N unread" + aria-expanded); the expanded card carries a labelled close control, so both states are keyboard- and screen-reader-reachable
The contact name renders as plain text (not a heading) so it never forces a heading level onto the host page; the messages sit in a role=log region labelled with the contact
Each bubble carries a visually-hidden sender prefix so incoming vs outgoing never relies on colour or side alone; the avatar, unread pill and status dot are decorative and aria-hidden
The composer Input and send Button are labelled; the size/stagger morph respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider, collapsing to a plain crossfade

intents: a chat preview that expands into a full conversation or messaging panel
a morph from a message preview to a chat thread with a composer
an animated messaging interface built on ibirdui
